text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It all starts from a random conversation one
evening.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: The Unity Cup?

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
Yup. It's a team competition that used to be held
at Tracen Academy, separate from the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
It was only an unofficial thing, so it didn't actually
affect anyone's track records...

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
But it was such a thrillin' event! All those racers
working together to overcome trials and
tribulations in the name of seizin' victory!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All that excitement while runnin' alongside
friends?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaw! It all sounds fantabulous!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Seems like a rip-roarin' good time, which is why
I've come to ask you about it, Director!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Hm, the Unity Cup! It's been a good while since
I've heard mention of it!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I believe it fell out of favor since it used to be
held at the same time as the Twinkle Series,
hence few chose to enter... However!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Team races have an appeal all their own, and
they often pushed racers to achieve new heights
in the Twinkle Series also!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But most importantly! I admire your enthusiasm
for new challenges! In short, I approve!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And on the very next day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crackle, psssh...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Testing, testing! Apologies for interrupting your
lunch hour. I have an announcement for all
students and trainers!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: As of today... the Unity Cup returns!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
What's the Unity Cup? Do you know anything
about it, Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I feel like I heard about it in class, but I
can't remember...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: "What is the Unity Cup?" you may ask!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
'Tis a competition established long ago at Tracen
Academy, in which students form teams to
compete against one another!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Participants compete in five different categories
of races—sprint, mile, medium, long, and
dirt—until a single team emerges victorious!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
But note that participating in the Unity Cup
doesn't automatically qualify the team members
to run in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Your first and foremost goal should be to perform
well in the Twinkle Series on your own—do not
forget this!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However, this competition will offer you
experience that you cannot cultivate in individual
races, and will help facilitate your growth as
runners!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Work as one with your team members! Unite your
hearts! And celebrate the potential of youth!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I have nothing but great expectations for your
growth as I hereby reinstate the Unity Cup!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Now then, trainers, assemble your teams!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: I expect you all to do your very best! That's all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wahoo! Time to get a-trainin' and a-racin' with
my friends!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A wave of surprise ripples through the student
body at this sudden and unexpected
announcement!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is a startling development, but it's always
good to provide our athletes with the opportunity
to experience new things.
choice_data_list:
(All right, time to put together an unbeatable
team!)

(All right, time to put together an unbeatable
team!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm just starting to get excited for the event
when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crackle!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Final note! I forgot to mention that I've been
assigned to a work placement in America that will
last several years!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
As I will be busy with constant travel, I'll be
unable to watch over you all in this endeavor!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However, rest assured! To ensure that my absence
does not negatively impact your efforts...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I have appointed an executive member of the
URA to act as temporary director and to oversee
the Unity Cup!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
She is a highly capable trainer, and I'm sure her
genuine love for Umamusume athletes will make
her an excellent—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Director, but time is running a bit
short...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! Is it already time? Be good, you all! I shall
be taking off now!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The rest is in your hands! Do your best out there,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vwoom-vwoom-vwoom-vwoom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Director Akikawa takes off into the sky in
her private helicopter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's with this chaotic announcement and departure
that the Unity Cup is reinstated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A sense of excitement lingers in the air, but
unbeknownst to the students and staff of Tracen
Academy, dark clouds are gathering on the
horizon...
